steps.title: Find a sample difference
steps.content: The student wants to contrast the two samples, so the sentence must highlight a difference between the TPU fiber and the SEBS rubber fiber. The notes give one clear difference: the TPU sample was 3 millimeters thick, and the SEBS sample was 4 millimeters thick.

steps.title: Reject shared or general facts
steps.content: Choice A states a similarity: both samples heated when twisted. Choice B only says both samples were included in the 2019 study. Choice C gives general background about torsional heating rather than comparing the two specific samples. The answer is D.
